corrections.text: Eight of the nine cited sources (figure.ai, humanoidsdaily.com, glitchwire.com, techtimes.com, thestar.com.my, cryptobriefing.com, en.sedaily.com, finance.biggo.com) were not on the project's source allowlist at submission time. figure.ai is the primary corporate publisher for Helix releases; the others are reputable humanoid-robotics and tech-business outlets. Manually verified by the Chief Editor.
